form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 7th over 300m at Healesville beaten 5 lengths (17.28) behind Major Illusion in a T3 Grade 7 on March 25. Has performed below expectations at her last couple but is capable of far better.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Most recently finished last in a T3 RSTW on February 18 over 425m at Bendigo behind Lakeview Mitch beaten 9 lengths (24.84). Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Most recently finished last in a T3 RSTW on February 18 over 425m at Bendigo behind Lakeview Mitch beaten 9 lengths (24.84). Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a fast early sectional but gathered in and finished in the minors when third (22.66) at this track over 390m. Has ability and among the chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Charged out of the boxes with a fast early sectional but gathered in and finished in the minors when third (22.66) at this track over 390m. Has ability and among the chances.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fourth last time out over 400m at Geelong. Prepared to overlook.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fourth last time out over 400m at Geelong. Prepared to overlook.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Contacted on first turn.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in his races, The latest effort was a 5.5 lengths fourth over 390m at Ballarat. Prefer in something easier.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in his races, The latest effort was a 5.5 lengths fourth over 390m at Ballarat. Prefer in something easier.

form.formComment: Last start finished fifth over 425m at Bendigo, beaten 18 lengths (25.12) behind Paw Ortiz in a Special conditions H on March 31. Prefer to watch at this stage.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished fifth over 425m at Bendigo, beaten 18 lengths (25.12) behind Paw Ortiz in a Special conditions H on March 31. Prefer to watch at this stage.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Galloped on turning off back straight fell and checked.

form.formComment: Good effort to score just six days ago over 390m at this track by 1.3 lengths in a Rank Limit - Maiden. Can continue her winning ways.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to score just six days ago over 390m at this track by 1.3 lengths in a Rank Limit - Maiden. Can continue her winning ways.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together in the turn out of the back straight and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Last start finished 4th on March 30 over 390m at this track behind Capo Dei Capi beaten 6 lengths (22.57) in a Grade 7. Leading chance who should prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 4th on March 30 over 390m at this track behind Capo Dei Capi beaten 6 lengths (22.57) in a Grade 7. Leading chance who should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings at final run of last campaign, finishing seventh (22.89) at Ballarat before going for a four-and-a-half months spell. Capable of playing a role in the finish.
